words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ الْبَرْمَجَةُ مَهَارَةً أَسَاسِيَّةً فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ الرَّقْمِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Programiranje se smatra temeljnom vještinom na digitalnom tržištu rada.
words.exampleEn: Programming is considered a core skill in the digital job market.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْتَمِدُ مُحَرِّكَاتُ الْبَحْثِ عَلَى خَوَارِزْمِيَّاتٍ مَعَقَّدَةٍ لِتَرْتِيبِ النَّتَائِجِ.
words.exampleBs: Pretraživači se oslanjaju na složene algoritme za rangiranje rezultata.
words.exampleEn: Search engines rely on complex algorithms to rank results.

words.exampleArabic: تُخَزِّنُ قَاعِدَةُ الْبَيَانَاتِ مَعْلُومَاتِ الْمَرْضَى بِشَكْلٍ آمَنٍ وَمُنَظَّمٍ.
words.exampleBs: Baza podataka čuva informacije o pacijentima na siguran i organiziran način.
words.exampleEn: The database stores patient information in a secure and organized manner.

words.exampleArabic: أَدَّى الْخَطَأُ الْبَرْمَجِيُّ إِلَى تَعَطُّلِ النِّظَامِ الْكَامِلِ.
words.exampleBs: Greška u kodu dovela je do potpunog pada sistema.
words.exampleEn: The software bug caused the entire system to crash.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَغْرِقُ إِصْلَاحُ الأَخْطَاءِ فِي الأَنْظِمَةِ الْمَعَقَّدَةِ وَقْتًا وَجُهْدًا كَبِيرَيْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Otklanjanje grešaka u složenim sistemima zahtijeva puno vremena i truda.
words.exampleEn: Debugging complex systems takes considerable time and effort.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْمُبَرْمِجُونَ أَنْظِمَةَ التَّحَكُّمِ بِالإِصْدَارَاتِ لِتَتَبُّعِ التَّعْدِيلَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Programeri koriste sisteme kontrole verzija za praćenje izmjena.
words.exampleEn: Programmers use version control systems to track modifications.

words.exampleArabic: يُسَهِمُ الْمَصْدَرُ الْمَفْتُوحُ فِي تَسْرِيعِ الِابْتِكَارِ التِّقْنِيِّ عَالَمِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Otvoreni kod doprinosi ubrzanju tehnoloških inovacija globalno.
words.exampleEn: Open source contributes to accelerating technological innovation globally.

words.exampleArabic: يُحَوِّلُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ قِطَاعَاتٍ اقْتِصَادِيَّةً بِأَكْمَلِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Vještačka inteligencija transformira čitave ekonomske sektore.
words.exampleEn: Artificial intelligence is transforming entire economic sectors.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ التَّعَلُّمُ الآلِيُّ عَلَى كَمِّيَّاتٍ ضَخْمَةٍ مِنَ الْبَيَانَاتِ لِتَحْسِينِ النَّمَاذِجِ.
words.exampleBs: Mašinsko učenje oslanja se na ogromne količine podataka za poboljšanje modela.
words.exampleEn: Machine learning relies on massive amounts of data to improve models.

words.exampleArabic: تُحَاكِي الشَّبَكَةُ الْعَصَبِيَّةُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيَّةُ طَرِيقَةَ عَمَلِ الدِّمَاغِ الْبَشَرِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Vještačka neuronska mreža oponaša način rada ljudskog mozga.
words.exampleEn: The artificial neural network mimics the way the human brain works.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَطَلَّبُ مُعَالَجَةُ الْبَيَانَاتِ الضَّخْمَةِ بُنْيَةً تَحْتِيَّةً حَاسُوبِيَّةً مُتَطَوِّرَةً.
words.exampleBs: Obrada velikih podataka zahtijeva naprednu računarsku infrastrukturu.
words.exampleEn: Processing big data requires advanced computational infrastructure.

words.exampleArabic: تُهَدِّدُ الأَتْمَتَةُ وَظَائِفَ كَثِيرَةً فِي الصِّنَاعَاتِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Automatizacija prijeti mnogim radnim mjestima u tradicionalnim industrijama.
words.exampleEn: Automation threatens many jobs in traditional industries.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْمِي التَّشْفِيرُ الْبَيَانَاتِ الْحَسَّاسَةَ مِنَ الْوُصُولِ غَيْرِ الْمُصَرَّحِ بِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Enkripcija štiti osjetljive podatke od neovlaštenog pristupa.
words.exampleEn: Encryption protects sensitive data from unauthorized access.

words.exampleArabic: يَمْنَعُ جِدَارُ الْحِمَايَةِ الِاتِّصَالَاتِ الضَّارَّةَ مِنَ الدُّخُولِ إِلَى الشَّبَكَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Vatrozid sprječava štetne komunikacije od ulaska u mrežu.
words.exampleEn: The firewall prevents harmful communications from entering the network.

words.exampleArabic: تَعَرَّضَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ لِاخْتِرَاقٍ إِلِكْتْرُونِيٍّ أَدَّى إِلَى سَرِقَةِ بَيَانَاتِ الْعُمَلَاءِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je bila izložena hakerskom napadu koji je rezultirao krađom podataka klijenata.
words.exampleEn: The company was subjected to a cyberattack that resulted in the theft of customer data.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَهْدِفُ التَّصَيُّدُ الِاحْتِيَالِيُّ الْمُسْتَخْدِمِينَ بِرَسَائِلَ إِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةٍ مُضَلِّلَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Phishing napadi ciljaju korisnike putem zavaravajućih elektronskih poruka.
words.exampleEn: Phishing targets users with misleading electronic messages.

words.exampleArabic: يُوَفِّرُ التَّحَقُّقُ الثُّنَائِيُّ طَبَقَةً إِضَافِيَّةً مِنَ الْحِمَايَةِ لِلْحُسَابَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Dvofaktorska provjera autentičnosti pruža dodatni sloj zaštite za račune.
words.exampleEn: Two-factor authentication provides an additional layer of protection for accounts.

words.exampleArabic: تَكَبَّدَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ خَسَائِرَ مَالِيَّةً وَسُمْعَتِيَّةً جَرَّاءَ اخْتِرَاقِ بَيَانَاتِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je pretrpjela finansijske i reputacijske gubitke zbog povrede sigurnosti podataka.
words.exampleEn: The company suffered financial and reputational losses due to a data breach.

words.exampleArabic: تَوَقَّفَ الْخَادِمُ الرَّئِيسِيُّ بِسَبَبِ حَمَلٍ زَائِدٍ عَلَى النِّظَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Glavni server je prestao raditi zbog preopterećenja sistema.
words.exampleEn: The main server went down due to system overload.

words.exampleArabic: يُتِيحُ التَّخْزِينُ السَّحَابِيُّ الْوُصُولَ إِلَى الْمَلَفَّاتِ مِنْ أَيِّ مَكَانٍ فِي الْعَالَمِ.
words.exampleBs: Pohrana u oblaku omogućava pristup datotekama s bilo kojeg mjesta na svijetu.
words.exampleEn: Cloud storage allows access to files from anywhere in the world.

words.exampleArabic: يَنْبَغِي إِجْرَاءُ النَّسْخِ الِاحْتِيَاطِيِّ بِشَكْلٍ مُنْتَظِمٍ لِحِمَايَةِ الْبَيَانَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Sigurnosne kopije treba redovito praviti radi zaštite podataka.
words.exampleEn: Backups should be made regularly to protect data.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَثِّرُ عَرْضُ النِّطَاقِ التَّرَدُّدِيِّ الْمَحْدُودُ عَلَى سُرْعَةِ تَحَمُّلِ الْبَيَانَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Ograničena propusnost mreže utječe na brzinu prijenosa podataka.
words.exampleEn: Limited bandwidth affects data transfer speed.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَدِّي ارْتِفَاعُ زَمَنِ الِاسْتِجَابَةِ إِلَى تَدَهْوُرِ تَجْرِبَةِ الْمُسْتَخْدِمِ.
words.exampleBs: Visoka latencija dovodi do pogoršanja korisničkog iskustva.
words.exampleEn: High latency leads to a deterioration in user experience.

words.exampleArabic: شَهِدَتِ التِّجَارَةُ الإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةُ نُمُوًّا مُتَسَارِعًا خِلَالَ السَّنَوَاتِ الْأَخِيرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: E-trgovina je doživjela ubrzani rast tokom posljednjih godina.
words.exampleEn: E-commerce has experienced accelerated growth in recent years.

words.exampleArabic: يُتِيحُ الدَّفْعُ الرَّقْمِيُّ إِجْرَاءَ الْمُعَامَلَاتِ الْمَالِيَّةِ دُونَ الْحَاجَةِ إِلَى نَقْدٍ.
words.exampleBs: Digitalno plaćanje omogućava financijske transakcije bez potrebe za gotovinom.
words.exampleEn: Digital payment allows financial transactions without the need for cash.

words.exampleArabic: تَتَفَاوَتُ آرَاءُ الاقْتِصَادِيِّينَ حَوْلَ مُسْتَقْبَلِ الْعُمْلَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mišljenja ekonomista o budućnosti digitalnih valuta se razilaze.
words.exampleEn: Economists' opinions on the future of digital currencies diverge.

words.exampleArabic: أَعَادَ اقْتِصَادُ الْمَنَصَّاتِ تَعْرِيفَ مَفْهُومِ الْعَمَلِ وَالتَّوْظِيفِ الْحَدِيثِ.
words.exampleBs: Platformska ekonomija je redefinirala pojam modernog rada i zapošljavanja.
words.exampleEn: The platform economy has redefined the concept of modern work and employment.

words.exampleArabic: يُسْتَخْدَمُ الْوَاقِعُ الِافْتِرَاضِيُّ فِي تَدْرِيبِ الْأَطِبَّاءِ عَلَى إِجْرَاءِ الْعَمَلِيَّاتِ الْجِرَاحِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Virtuelna stvarnost se koristi za obuku ljekara u izvođenju hirurških operacija.
words.exampleEn: Virtual reality is used to train doctors in performing surgical operations.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ تَطْبِيقَاتُ الْوَاقِعِ الْمُعَزَّزِ طَبَقَاتٍ رَقْمِيَّةً فَوْقَ الْمُحِيطِ الْحَقِيقِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Aplikacije proširene stvarnosti koriste digitalne slojeve postavljene preko stvarnog okruženja.
words.exampleEn: Augmented reality applications use digital layers overlaid on the real environment.

words.exampleArabic: يُتِيحُ إِنْتَرْنِتُ الأَشْيَاءِ رَبْطَ الأَجْهِزَةِ الْمَنْزِلِيَّةِ بِالشَّبَكَةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Internet stvari omogućava povezivanje kućnih uređaja s digitalnom mrežom.
words.exampleEn: The Internet of Things allows household devices to be connected to the digital network.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْتَمِدُ سِلْسِلَةُ الْكُتَلِ عَلَى التَّوَزُّعِ اللَّامَرْكَزِيِّ لِضَمَانِ شَفَافِيَّةِ الْمُعَامَلَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Blockchain se oslanja na decentraliziranu distribuciju za osiguranje transparentnosti transakcija.
words.exampleEn: Blockchain relies on decentralized distribution to ensure transaction transparency.

words.exampleArabic: طَوَّرَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ تَطْبِيقًا لِلْهَاتِفِ يُسَهِّلُ حَجْزَ الْمَوَاعِيدِ الطِّبِّيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je razvila mobilnu aplikaciju koja olakšava zakazivanje medicinskih pregleda.
words.exampleEn: The company developed a mobile application that simplifies booking medical appointments.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْتَمِدُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الشَّرِكَاتِ عَلَى الْحَوْسَبَةِ السَّحَابِيَّةِ لِتَقْلِيصِ تَكَالِيفِ الْبُنْيَةِ التَّحْتِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mnoge kompanije oslanjaju se na računarstvo u oblaku radi smanjivanja troškova infrastrukture.
words.exampleEn: Many companies rely on cloud computing to reduce infrastructure costs.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَطِيعُ الذَّكَاءُ الِاصْطِنَاعِيُّ التَّوْلِيدِيُّ إِنْتَاجَ نُصُوصٍ وَصُوَرٍ وَمُقَطُّعَاتٍ صَوْتِيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Generativna vještačka inteligencija može producirati tekstove, slike i audio zapise.
words.exampleEn: Generative AI can produce texts, images, and audio clips.

words.exampleArabic: تُدْرَّبُ نَمَاذِجُ اللُّغَةِ الْكَبِيرَةُ عَلَى كَمِّيَّاتٍ هَائِلَةٍ مِنَ النُّصُوصِ.
words.exampleBs: Veliki jezički modeli se treniraju na ogromnim količinama tekstova.
words.exampleEn: Large language models are trained on massive quantities of text.

words.exampleArabic: تَعْتَمِدُ نَمَاذِجُ الذَّكَاءِ الِاصْطِنَاعِيِّ بِشَكْلٍ كَبِيرٍ عَلَى مُعَالِجَاتِ الرَّسُومَاتِ الْقَوِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Modeli vještačke inteligencije u velikoj mjeri ovise o snažnim grafičkim procesorima.
words.exampleEn: Artificial intelligence models rely heavily on powerful graphics processing units.

words.exampleArabic: يَزْدَادُ الطَّلَبُ عَلَى مُتَخَصِّصِي الأَمْنِ السِّيبَرَانِيِّ مَعَ تَصَاعُدِ التَّهْدِيدَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Potražnja za stručnjacima za kibernetičku sigurnost raste s porastom digitalnih prijetnji.
words.exampleEn: Demand for cybersecurity specialists grows as digital threats escalate.

words.exampleArabic: تُوَفِّرُ الشَّبَكَةُ الافْتِرَاضِيَّةُ الخَاصَّةُ اتِّصَالًا آمَنًا وَمُشَفَّرًا عَبْرَ الإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
words.exampleBs: VPN pruža sigurnu i šifriranu vezu putem interneta.
words.exampleEn: A VPN provides a secure and encrypted connection over the internet.

words.exampleArabic: تُسَاهِمُ الرُّوبُوتِيَّاتُ فِي تَحْسِينِ كَفَاءَةِ الْإِنْتَاجِ فِي الْمَصَانِعِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Robotika doprinosi poboljšanju produktivnosti u modernim fabrikama.
words.exampleEn: Robotics contributes to improving production efficiency in modern factories.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْمَحُ الطِّبَاعَةُ ثُلَاثِيَّةُ الأَبْعَادِ بِإِنْشَاءِ نَمَاذِجَ جِسْمَانِيَّةٍ مِنَ التَّصَمِيمَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: 3D štampa omogućava izradu fizičkih modela iz digitalnih dizajna.
words.exampleEn: 3D printing allows physical models to be created from digital designs.

words.exampleArabic: يُقَلِّصُ نَهْجُ حَافَّةِ الْحَوْسَبَةِ زَمَنَ الِاسْتِجَابَةِ بِمُعَالَجَةِ الْبَيَانَاتِ قُرْبَ مَصْدَرِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Pristup rubnog računarstva smanjuje latenciju obradom podataka blizu izvora.
words.exampleEn: Edge computing reduces latency by processing data close to its source.

words.exampleArabic: تَحْرِصُ الشَّرِكَاتُ التِّقْنِيَّةُ عَلَى تَصْمِيمِ وَاجِهَاتِ مُسْتَخْدِمٍ سَهْلَةِ الِاسْتِخْدَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Tehnološke kompanije posvećuju pažnju dizajniranju intuitivnih korisničkih sučelja.
words.exampleEn: Technology companies focus on designing easy-to-use user interfaces.

words.exampleArabic: تُؤَثِّرُ تَجْرِبَةُ الْمُسْتَخْدِمِ الْإِيجَابِيَّةُ عَلَى وَلَاءِ الْعُمَلَاءِ وَمَبِيعَاتِ الْمُنْتَجَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Pozitivno korisničko iskustvo utječe na lojalnost kupaca i prodaju proizvoda.
words.exampleEn: Positive user experience affects customer loyalty and product sales.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ شَرِكَاتُ التِّجَارَةِ الإِلِكْتْرُونِيَّةِ الْبِيَانَاتِ الضَّخْمَةَ لِفَهْمِ سُلُوكِ الْمُسْتَهْلِكِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanije za e-trgovinu koriste velike podatke za razumijevanje ponašanja potrošača.
words.exampleEn: E-commerce companies use big data to understand consumer behavior.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الأَفْرَادِ وَالْمُؤَسَّسَاتِ الِاهْتِمَامُ بِالأَمَانِ الرَّقْمِيِّ لِحِمَايَةِ مَعْلُومَاتِهِمْ.
words.exampleBs: Pojedinci i institucije moraju brinuti o digitalnoj sigurnosti kako bi zaštitili svoje podatke.
words.exampleEn: Individuals and institutions must pay attention to digital security to protect their information.

words.exampleArabic: تُطْلِقُ الشَّرِكَةُ نُسْخَةً مُحَدَّثَةً مِنَ الْبُرْمَجِيَّاتِ مَرَّتَيْنِ سَنَوِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija objavljuje ažuriranu verziju softvera dva puta godišnje.
words.exampleEn: The company releases an updated version of the software twice a year.

words.exampleArabic: يَحْتَاجُ الْعَتَادُ الْحَاسُوبِيُّ إِلَى صِيَانَةٍ دَوْرِيَّةٍ لِضَمَانِ أَدَاءٍ مُثَالِيٍّ.
words.exampleBs: Hardver treba periodično održavanje radi osiguranja optimalnih performansi.
words.exampleEn: Hardware requires periodic maintenance to ensure optimal performance.

words.exampleArabic: غَيَّرَتِ الشَّبَكَةُ الْعَنْكَبُوتِيَّةُ طَرِيقَةَ تَوَاصُلِ الْبَشَرِ وَتَبَادُلِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Internet je promijenio način komunikacije i razmjene informacija među ljudima.
words.exampleEn: The internet has changed the way humans communicate and exchange information.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ إِنْتَرْنِتُ الأَشْيَاءِ عَلَى تَحَدُّثِ الآلَاتِ لِتَبَادُلِ الْبَيَانَاتِ تِلْقَائِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Internet stvari oslanja se na komunikaciju stroj-stroj za automatsku razmjenu podataka.
words.exampleEn: The Internet of Things relies on machine-to-machine communication for automatic data exchange.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ النَّقْلُ الآمِنُ لِلْبَيَانَاتِ عَلَى بُرُوتُوكُولَاتِ تَشْفِيرٍ مُعَقَّدَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Sigurni prijenos podataka oslanja se na složene protokole enkripcije.
words.exampleEn: Secure data transfer relies on complex encryption protocols.

words.exampleArabic: تُطَوِّرُ الشَّرِكَاتُ مَنَصَّاتِ الذَّكَاءِ الِاصْطِنَاعِيِّ لِتَلْبِيَةِ احْتِيَاجَاتِ الصِّنَاعَاتِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanije razvijaju AI platforme za zadovoljavanje potreba različitih industrija.
words.exampleEn: Companies develop AI platforms to meet the needs of various industries.

words.exampleArabic: تَخُوضُ الْمُؤَسَّسَاتُ الْحُكُومِيَّةُ مَرَاحِلَ التَّحَوُّلِ الرَّقْمِيِّ بِوَتِيرَةٍ مُتَسَارِعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Državne institucije prolaze kroz faze digitalne transformacije ubrzanim tempom.
words.exampleEn: Government institutions are undergoing stages of digital transformation at an accelerated pace.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ الْمَعْلُومَاتِيَّةُ مِنْ أَسْرَعِ التَّخَصُّصَاتِ نُمُوًّا فِي الْعُقُودِ الأَخِيرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Informatika je jedan od najbrže rastućih smjerova u posljednjim decenijama.
words.exampleEn: Computer science is one of the fastest-growing specializations in recent decades.
